text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After coming back from a race...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I did?! I don't even remember...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for worrying you. I'll be careful not to do
it again...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I feel fine, really. At any given moment, I'm ready
to give it my all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, Silence Suzuka is visibly
exhausted. I may have to adjust her schedule to
ease up on races for the near future.
